generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor embedded in physical asset to detect occupancy levels, integrated into BIM model with metadata including sensor ID, calibration parameters, and data format. Part of TwinLight project for real-time feedback on occupancy states."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring temperature within building infrastructure, integrated into BIM model with metadata for Eclipse Hono ingestion. Used for real-time monitoring and energy optimization in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring ambient light levels, integrated into BIM model with metadata for Ditto digital representation. Provides real-time feedback for visual comfort optimization in TwinLight project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) sensor measuring energy consumption across building systems, integrated into BIM model with metadata for Eclipse Hono. Enables real-time energy monitoring and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance BimEmbeddedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Generic BIM-embedded sensor representing all IoT/BCS sensors integrated into the BIM model with standardized metadata (sensor IDs, calibration parameters, data formats) for DT framework ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BimEmbeddedSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streamed from IoT sensors to Eclipse Hono middleware for protocol-agnostic ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streamed from IoT sensors to Eclipse Hono middleware for secure ingestion and Ditto digital representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data streamed from IoT sensors to Eclipse Hono middleware for visual comfort analytics in TwinLight project."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data streamed from BCS sensors to Eclipse Hono middleware for predictive analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance BimEmbeddedSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Aggregated sensor data from all BIM-embedded IoT/BCS sensors streamed to Eclipse Hono for DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BimEmbeddedSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimStaticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically rich 3D BIM model representing building geometry, topology, and component relationships, enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations). Acts as semantic backbone for DT framework."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance DeviceRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital representation of devices generated via model-to-model transformations from BIM, including Ditto digital twin instances and TwinLight BIM-centric control configurations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed sensor readings, device states, and event logs from IoT/BCS components via Eclipse Hono, used for real-time monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, BimEmbeddedSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance SimulationAnalyticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics models (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning models) for energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight open-source IoT middleware facilitating secure, protocol-agnostic data ingestion from sensors and devices. Acts as message broker for real-time data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework managing digital twin instances and runtime interfaces for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual twins."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ModularServiceIntegration
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D rendering engine providing rich, interactive visualization for real-time monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ScenarioTestingService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for model transformations (model-to-model and model-to-text) generating deployable artifacts from BIM for Eclipse Hono, Ditto, and Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework (as in BOREALIS project) for adaptive control optimization of building systems using reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building operations in Unreal Engine 5, enabling spatially aware interaction for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, OperationalPerformanceVisualization
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using reinforcement learning to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects through iterative control policy refinement."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control configuration framework automating deployment of device-specific control logic and bidirectional communication between DT and physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlConfigurationAutomation, BidirectionalCommunicationEstablishment
]

instance ScenarioTestingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service supporting what-if analysis for operational changes (e.g., refurbishment planning) by simulating impact before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentImpactAnalysis, OperationalChangeSimulation
]

instance ModularServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling DT engineers to develop and deploy custom services (e.g., AI-driven fault detection, predictive maintenance) via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceDeployment, FaultDetectionIntegration
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights from real-time sensor data enabling facility managers to visualize system states and operational performance in Unreal Engine 5."
]

instance OperationalPerformanceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations for facility managers to monitor system states and performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for optimizing energy consumption based on real-time sensor data and reinforcement learning models."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on visual comfort optimization derived from light level sensors and adaptive control strategies in TwinLight project."
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects insights generated from environmental sensor data and predictive analytics models."
]

instance ControlConfigurationAutomation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of device-specific control logic based on BIM model configurations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationEstablishment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Establishment of real-time bidirectional communication between DT and physical building systems via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RefurbishmentImpactAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of potential impacts from refurbishment or operational changes before physical implementation."
]

instance OperationalChangeSimulation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Simulation of operational changes to evaluate their impact on building performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceDeployment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deployment of custom DT services (e.g., AI-driven fault detection) via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FaultDetectionIntegration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integration of AI-driven fault detection capabilities into the DT framework for predictive maintenance."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator controlling adaptive lighting systems, modeled in BIM with metadata for Ditto digital representation. Executes commands from DT for dynamic lighting adjustments."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator managing HVAC controls, integrated into BIM with device configurations for bidirectional communication via Eclipse Hono."
]

instance AdaptiveShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled adaptive shading mechanism controlled by DT, modeled in BIM with metadata for real-time adjustments based on sensor data."
]

instance BimEmbeddedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Generic BIM-embedded actuator representing all physical acting components (lighting, HVAC, shading) with standardized control logic configurations."
]

// C1: Modular Architecture Components
instance CentralizedDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized configuration of the DT system where all sub-twins are managed from a single control plane, enabling scalable deployment across building infrastructures."
    base:isContainedIn AeCoDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance DecentralizedDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Decentralized configuration of the DT system where sub-twins operate independently with localized control, supporting modular deployment in distributed building systems."
    base:isContainedIn AeCoDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance LightingSubTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular sub-twin focusing on lighting system control and optimization, implemented as part of the TwinLight project with standardized extension points."
    base:isContainedIn AeCoDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance HvacSubTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular sub-twin managing HVAC systems with predictive analytics for energy optimization, integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
    base:isContainedIn AeCoDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance OccupancySubTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular sub-twin specializing in occupancy detection and space utilization analytics, providing real-time feedback for facility management."
    base:isContainedIn AeCoDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance AeCoDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment for Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, representing building infrastructures throughout their entire lifecycle."
    base:contains CentralizedDigitalTwin, DecentralizedDigitalTwin, LightingSubTwin, HvacSubTwin, OccupancySubTwin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control commands and adjustments** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the **Building Control Systems (BCS) and IoT actuators**. These commands include **setpoints for lighting, HVAC, and shading systems**, as well as **dynamic reconfiguration of control logic** (e.g., reinforcement learning-based adjustments in the **BOREALIS project**). The **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** platforms facilitate **bidirectional communication** by exposing **standardized APIs** for device control. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an **interactive interface** for **Facility Managers** to manually override or fine-tune control parameters. For instance, the DT may adjust lighting levels in response to occupancy data or energy efficiency goals, with these adjustments executed by the physical actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time synchronization scale**, ensuring continuous alignment between the physical and virtual representations. The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** through **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, enabling **sub-second to millisecond latency** for critical operations such as sensor data ingestion and control signal execution. While the exact latency metrics are not specified, the emphasis on **real-time monitoring** and **live synchronization** implies high-frequency updates. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this synchronization, ensuring the DT remains closely coupled with its physical counterpart throughout its operational life cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** centered around the **BIM-based semantic backbone**. Key components include:
  1. **BIM Model**: The **source of truth** for building geometry, topology, and device metadata.
  2. **Hono/Ditto Configurator**: Extracts **device metadata** from BIM and generates **runtime interfaces** for **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto**.
  3. **Eclipse Hono**: Handles **real-time data ingestion** from **IoT sensors and BCS**.
  4. **Eclipse Ditto**: Manages **digital twin instances** and **bidirectional communication** with physical devices.
  5. **Unreal Engine 5**: Provides **immersive visualization** for **Facility Managers**.
  6. **Custom Services Layer**: Hosts **domain-specific services** (e.g., **reinforcement learning for lighting optimization** in **BOREALIS**) integrated via **standardized extension points**.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** by allowing **independent scaling** of components (e.g., **Hono for data ingestion**, **Ditto for twin management**, and **Unreal Engine for visualization**). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **interoperability** and **architectural soundness** of the constellation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life cycle stages** of the building, from **design and construction** to **operation, refurbishment, and adaptation**. During the **design phase**, the DT leverages **BIM models** to simulate building performance and detect clashes. In the **construction phase**, it supports **automated commissioning** of **Building Control Systems (BCS)** by extracting device metadata from BIM. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** (e.g., **BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning** for lighting optimization). For **refurbishment**, the DT provides **what-if analysis** to evaluate the impact of modifications before physical implementation. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with **AECO standards** (e.g., BIM) and supports **evolutionary upgrades** through **runtime configuration management** and **modular service integration**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart. The framework incorporates:
  - **Model Validation**: Ensures semantic consistency and correctness of BIM-enriched models before deployment.
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Leverages **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** to maintain **live data alignment** between physical and virtual assets.
  - **Uncertainty Management**: While not explicitly detailed, the emphasis on **real-time monitoring** and **predictive analytics** implies mechanisms to mitigate **semantic drift** (divergence between digital and physical states) over time.
  The ODTE metric provides a **quantitative measure** of the DT’s fidelity, guiding iterative improvements to ensure the twin remains a **high-fidelity representation** of the physical asset throughout its life cycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **real-time data ingestion** from physical sensors and **Eclipse Ditto** for **device state management** and bidirectional communication. The framework supports **metadata-driven connectivity**, where device configurations (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoints) are extracted from the **BIM model** and used to establish connections. While the exact network protocols are not specified, the emphasis on 'real-time data exchange' implies the use of **lightweight, high-throughput protocols** (e.g., MQTT-like mechanisms) for efficient synchronization. The architecture is designed for **scalable, modular integration** of heterogeneous IoT/BCS devices."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed using a **scalable, service-oriented architecture** that leverages **middleware (Hono/Ditto)** and **visualization tools (Unreal Engine)**. The framework supports:
  - **Automated deployment pipelines** for generating runtime artifacts from BIM models.
  - **Modular service integration** via **standardized extension points**, enabling **scalable and future-proof deployments**.
  - **Centralized or decentralized hosting** depending on the complexity of the infrastructure and operational requirements.
  While the document does not specify **cloud/edge deployment strategies**, **Docker containers**, or **Kubernetes orchestration**, the emphasis on **scalability** and **modularity** implies a **containerized or microservices-based deployment model** to accommodate heterogeneous AECO environments."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** with external information systems through:
  - **Standardized data exchange protocols** enabled by **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, ensuring interoperability with **heterogeneous systems** (e.g., ERP, CMMS, IoT platforms).
  - **BIM as a semantic backbone**, facilitating integration with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for cross-domain collaboration.
  - **Modular architecture** with **extension points** for connecting to **federated DT ecosystems** or other digital infrastructure systems.
  While specific standards (e.g., **OPC UA, IFC**) are not explicitly listed, the framework is designed to **bridge siloed data sources** and enable **seamless information exchange** across the AECO value chain."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **BIM as the primary standardization backbone** for semantic consistency and interoperability in the AECO domain. It also incorporates:
  - **Standardized extension points** for modular service integration, ensuring compatibility with **domain-specific workflows**.
  - **Automated model-driven transformations** that align with **industry best practices** for DT deployment.
  While specific standards (e.g., **IFC, COBie, ISO 27001**) are not explicitly mentioned, the framework is designed to **leverage existing AECO standards** and **promote interoperability** across heterogeneous systems. The emphasis on **BIM-centric deployment** ensures alignment with **regulatory mandates** and **policy initiatives** driving digital transformation in the construction industry."
]
